title: esenbeckia hartmanii
intro: Esenbeckia hartmanii, also known as Hartmann's esenbeckia or Hartmann's ironwort, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Esenbeckia hartmanii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
